dt 5.2.0+85c491e913d5b195c7accdb530188992b86b16e6
Copyright © 2022-2025 by ScaleOut Software, Inc.

  -b, --buildconfig    (Default: Release) Build configuration.

  -r, --runtime        Packs the application with a specified .Net runtime
                       (win-x64, linux-x64, etc.). If omitted, the targeted .NET
                       runtime needs to be pre-installed on the ScaleOut host
                       machines.

  -t, --trim           (Ignored if -z is used.) If -r is specified, trims unused
                       framework libraries from the package.

  --help               Display this help screen.

  --version            Display version information.

dt 5.2.0+85c491e913d5b195c7accdb530188992b86b16e6
Copyright © 2022-2025 by ScaleOut Software, Inc.

  -z, --zip             Deploys the specified digital twin zip package.

  -a, --assemblyname    Filename of assembly to execute. Defaults to the
                        assembly built by current directory's project file.

  -l, --localdev        Starts local development process from build directory
                        without packaging.

  -n, --name            Digital twin model name. Defaults to the name of the
                        assembly built by current directory's project file.

  -c, --conn            ScaleOut connection string. Defaults to SOSS_DT_CONN
                        environment variable.

  -b, --buildconfig     (Default: Release) (Ignored if -z is used.) Build
                        configuration.

  -r, --runtime         (Ignored if -z is used.) Packs the application with a
                        specified .Net runtime (win-x64, linux-x64, etc.). If
                        omitted, the targeted .NET runtime needs to be
                        pre-installed on the ScaleOut host machines.

  -t, --trim            (Ignored if -z is used.) If -r is specified, trims
                        unused framework libraries from the package.

  -p, --params          Startup params to send to digital twin worker process.

  --help                Display this help screen.

  --version             Display version information.

dt 5.2.0+85c491e913d5b195c7accdb530188992b86b16e6
Copyright © 2022-2025 by ScaleOut Software, Inc.

  -z, --zip             Deploys the specified digital twin zip package.

  -a, --assemblyname    Filename of assembly to execute. Defaults to the
                        assembly built by current directory's project file.

  -l, --localdev        Starts local development process from build directory
                        without packaging.

  -n, --name            Digital twin model name. Defaults to the name of the
                        assembly built by current directory's project file.

  -c, --conn            ScaleOut connection string. Defaults to SOSS_DT_CONN
                        environment variable.

  -b, --buildconfig     (Default: Release) (Ignored if -z is used.) Build
                        configuration.

  -r, --runtime         (Ignored if -z is used.) Packs the application with a
                        specified .Net runtime (win-x64, linux-x64, etc.). If
                        omitted, the targeted .NET runtime needs to be
                        pre-installed on the ScaleOut host machines.

  -t, --trim            (Ignored if -z is used.) If -r is specified, trims
                        unused framework libraries from the package.

  -p, --params          Startup params to send to digital twin worker process.

  --help                Display this help screen.

  --version             Display version information.
